criteria.name: AI-Powered Personalization
criteria.description: The app leverages AI to analyze user's financial data and provide personalized advice, insights, and recommendations tailored to their specific financial situation and goals.

criteria.name: Automation of Financial Tasks
criteria.description: The app uses AI to automate tasks such as expense tracking, budgeting, saving, and investment, reducing manual effort and improving efficiency.

criteria.name: Investment Analysis and Insights
criteria.description: The app employs AI algorithms to analyze market trends, identify investment opportunities, and provide users with data-driven insights to make informed investment decisions.

criteria.name: Bill Management and Negotiation
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to help users manage their bills, including tracking due dates, automating payments, and negotiating lower rates with service providers.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The app provides a user-friendly interface and intuitive experience, making it easy for users to navigate and understand their financial data.
